register_system: Baihua vs wenyan remnants; context/honorific vocab for formal. Trap: wrong script or tone-ignored pinyin.
translationese_traps: English SVO/word order; literal chengyu; particle overuse; simp/trad mix.
return_to_original_risks: Script/tone loss; chengyu flattening; pinyin interference.
idiom_mapping_notes: Chengyu functional key (4-char); Nida dynamic; special handling clusters.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: 4 tones + neutral; retroflex sounds; no clusters.
professional_resources: Xinhua; ATA Chinese; govt styles; Baker chengyu.
